expectations.text: Output is a single valid HTML file (has <!DOCTYPE html> and closing </html>)
File contains a design rationale comment block documenting source material, detected niche, preserved elements, and improvements
expectations.evidence: Lines 1-54 contain source material, detected niche, preserved elements, and improvements sections

expectations.text: All three tiers are present: Starter ($29), Pro ($79), and Enterprise
expectations.evidence: All three article cards present with correct prices

expectations.text: Pro plan has a 'Most Popular' badge or equivalent highlight
expectations.evidence: Most Popular inside Pro card with aria-label attribute

expectations.text: A monthly/annual billing toggle is present in the HTML
JavaScript code exists that updates prices when the billing toggle is switched (look for event listener on toggle + price update logic)
expectations.evidence: toggle.addEventListener('click', ...) calls updatePrices() which sets starter-price and pro-price textContent

expectations.text: Annual pricing reflects the 20% discount (annual Starter ~$23, Pro ~$63)
expectations.evidence: prices.starter.annual: 23, prices.pro.annual: 63 hardcoded in price data object

expectations.text: Each pricing card contains a list of at least 4 feature bullet points
expectations.evidence: Starter: 5 bullets, Pro: 6 bullets, Enterprise: 5 bullets

expectations.text: Tailwind CSS is loaded via CDN script tag
Page has at least title and meta description tags
